svg.title: Stage 6 HFT Pipeline: Gateway to OMS Inbound Execution Reports
svg.desc: Flowchart showing execution reports flowing from the exchange through the gateway thread, into an SPSC queue, then into the OMS for state management and downstream consumers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What types of execution reports does an exchange send?')
sendPrompt('What does the gateway thread do when receiving execution reports?')
sendPrompt('Why is an SPSC queue used here instead of a shared queue?')
sendPrompt('What does the OMS do with execution reports in an HFT system?')
sendPrompt('How does real-time position tracking feed into the risk engine?')
sendPrompt('How do HFT strategies consume position and fill data from the OMS?')
sendPrompt('What audit and compliance obligations use execution report data?')
